answer: task_shape=independent architecture artifact plus irreversible user-owned data-boundary decision; executor=subagent for the design artifact and user for the irreversible commitment. effect_floor=O before naming targets. The O registry entry is candidate only and has unknown role certification and live payer-bound admission, so it fails closed. The ample certified T1 target cannot satisfy an O floor and is not a fallback. With no qualified O target there is no ranked chain, no handle and no in_flight transition: do not dispatch. Gather exact O qualification evidence and surface the irreversible decision to the user; only after both gates may a real handle-backed O dispatch proceed.
